name: Add Tool To Cell
description: Add a ToolModel to a RobotCell. Passthrough builder: returns a new cell, leaves the input untouched.

inputParameters.name: robot_cell
inputParameters.description: The RobotCell to add the tool to.

inputParameters.name: tool_id
inputParameters.description: Id used to identify the tool inside the cell. Defaults to the tool's own `.name`.

outputParameters.name: robot_cell
outputParameters.description: New RobotCell with the tool added.
